name: ZZLL Information Technology, Inc.
summary: ZZLL Information Technology, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides consumer-to-consumer, business-to-consumer, and business-to-business-sales services via web portals. Its online media syndicates video in a cloud-based, multimedia conduit serving a growing, global community of content creators, news outlets, and leading brands. ZZLL Information Technology, Inc. is based in North Point, Hong Kong.
